result.reason: The ConnectionInfo.CopyFrom method incorrectly copies properties only from the base class, missing properties defined directly in ConnectionInfo, which causes SSH Jump Mode configurations (and other properties) to not be duplicated correctly.
result.approach: Modify ConnectionInfo.CopyFrom to use this.GetType().GetProperties() instead of GetType().BaseType?.GetProperties(). Add a new test case in ConnectionInfoTests.cs to verify that all properties, including SSH Jump Mode related ones, are correctly copied during duplication.
